  9. created_by
  10. _form_header_expenses
=AND( OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_period])), [period] = ANY(settings[filter_period]) ), OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_category])), TEXT([category]) = TEXT(ANY(settings[filter_category])) ), OR( LOOKUP(USEREMAIL(), "users", "email", "role") = "ADMIN", [created_by] = USEREMAIL() ) )
UPDATES_AND_DELETES
expenses
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
payments_filtered
payments_filtered
  1. _RowNumber
  2. payment_id
  3. student_id
  4. payment_date
  5. amount
  6. payment_type
  7. comment
  8. created_at
  9. _form_header_payments
=AND( OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_payments_period])), YEAR([payment_date]) * 100 + MONTH([payment_date]) = NUMBER(ANY(settings[filter_payments_period])) ), OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_payments_class])), [student_id].[class_group] = ANY(settings[filter_payments_class]) ) )
UPDATES_AND_DELETES
payments
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
recent_payments
recent_payments
  1. _RowNumber
  2. payment_id
  3. student_id
  4. payment_date
  5. amount
  6. payment_type
  7. comment
  8. created_at
  9. _form_header_payments
=[payment_date] >= (TODAY() - 150)
ALL_CHANGES
payments
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
recent_charges
recent_charges
  1. _RowNumber
  2. charge_id
  3. student_id
  4. period
  5. tariff_id
  6. amount
  7. charge_type
  8. description
  9. created_at
  10. _form_header_charges
=NUMBER([period]) >= (YEAR(TODAY() - 150) * 100 + MONTH(TODAY() - 150))
ALL_CHANGES
charges
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
charges_filtered
charges_filtered
  1. _RowNumber
  2. charge_id
  3. student_id
  4. period
  5. tariff_id
  6. amount
  7. charge_type
  8. description
  9. created_at
  10. _form_header_charges
=AND( OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_charges_period])), [period] = ANY(settings[filter_charges_period]) ), OR( ISBLANK(ANY(settings[filter_charges_class])), [student_id].[class_group] = ANY(settings[filter_charges_class]) ) )
UPDATES_AND_DELETES
charges
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
students_by_family
students_by_family
  1. _RowNumber
  2. student_id
  3. family_id
  4. first_name
  5. last_name
  6. class_group

  8. start_date
  9. end_date
  10. comment
  11. created_at

  13. Related payments
  14. Related student_tariffs
  15. debt
  16. Related charges
  17. overdue_debt
  18. _form_header_students
  19. withdrawal_date
  20. birth_date
READ_ONLY
students
ALWAYS
  1. **auto**
settings_dash_открытый

READ_ONLY
settings
ALWAYS

    READ_ONLY
    settings
    ALWAYS
      settings_dash_земля
      settings_dash_земля
      1. _RowNumber

      3. dash_земля_получено

      5. dash_земля_свободные

      9. last_event_message
      READ_ONLY
      settings
      ALWAYS
        student_tariffs_по_тарифу
        student_tariffs_по_тарифу
        1. _RowNumber
        2. _student_name
        3. assignment_id
        ALL_CHANGES
        student_tariffs
        ALWAYS
        1. **auto**
        settings_dash_закрытие
        settings_dash_закрытие

        settings
        ALWAYS
          students_withdrawal
          students_withdrawal
          1. _RowNumber
          2. student_id
          3. withdrawal_date
          4. birth_date
          UPDATES_ONLY
          students
          ALWAYS
          1. **auto**
          students_visible
          students_visible
          1. _RowNumber
          2. student_id
          3. family_id
          4. first_name
          5. last_name
          6. class_group
          7. status
          8. start_date
          9. end_date
          10. withdrawal_date
          11. birth_date
          12. comment
          13. created_at
          14. _ComputedName
          15. Related payments
          16. Related student_tariffs
          17. debt
          18. Related charges
          19. overdue_debt
          20. _form_header_students
          =OR([status] = "Активен", [debt] <> 0)
          ALL_CHANGES
          students
          ALWAYS
          1. **auto**

          ALWAYS
          1

          Format Rules

          Collapse
          текущий долг ученик
          текущий долг ученик
          1. debt
          students
          =[debt] > 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"blue","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          текущий долг семья
          текущий долг семья
          1. family_debt
          families
          =[family_debt] > 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"blue","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          дебитрский долг семья
          дебитрский долг семья
          1. family_overdue_debt
          families
          =[family_overdue_debt] > 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"red","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          переплата семья
          переплата семья
          1. family_debt
          families
          =[family_debt] < 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"green","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          переплата ученик
          переплата ученик
          1. debt
          students
          =[debt] < 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"green","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          дебиторский долг ученик
          дебиторский долг ученик
          1. overdue_debt
          students
          =[overdue_debt] > 0
          1
          No
          {"textColor":"red","highlightColor":null,"textSize":1.0,"underline":false,"strikethrough":false,"bold":false,"italic":false,"uppercase":false,"icon":null,"imageSize":null}
          ALWAYS
          переплата дебит ученик
          переплата дебит ученик
          1. overdue_debt
